'''Atali''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Mathayus]]'' under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Coy]].

==Biography==
During a mission to transport [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]], the ''[[Mathayus]]'' intercepted a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Atali was sent with a team of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to investigate it. Unfortunately for him, the ship was a decoy laden with explosives that were set to go off if the ship's hull was breached. As Atali and his men entered, the explosives went off, killing him and badly damaging the ''Mathayus''{{'s}} hangar bay.

{{Char-stub}}
